zh.lifeSummary: 當John Stanley於1476年出生在英國斯塔福爾利費爾德時，他的父親George Stanley41歲，母親Eleanor Dudley alias Sutton38歲。他於1500年與Cecily Freebody在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1534年10月7日在英國武斯特斯爾霍爾 格林享年58歲，埋葬在英國斯塔福爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Stanley于1476年出生在英国斯塔福爾利費爾德时，他的父亲George Stanley41岁，母亲Eleanor Dudley alias Sutton38岁。他于1500年与Cecily Freebody在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1534年10月7日在英国武斯特斯爾霍爾 格林享年58岁，埋葬在英国斯塔福爾。

nameMeanings.name: Stanley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Stanley, including those in Yorkshire, Staffordshire, Derbyshire, Durham, Gloucestershire, and Wiltshire, named with Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. This English name has been established in Ireland since the 13th century where it was Gaelicized as de Stainléigh.

English: possibly also a variant of Stoneley, a habitational name from Stoneley Green in Burland (Cheshire), Stoneleigh (Warwickshire), or Stonely in Kimbolton (Huntingdonshire), all named with Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
Americanized form of any of various like-sounding names in other languages, for example Polish Stanislawski , Greek Anastasiou , and Serbian Stojadinov (patronymic from the personal name Stojadin).

variants.name: Stanislawski
meanings: Polish (Stanisławski): habitational name for someone from any of various places called Stanisław, Stanisławów, or Stanisławice, named with the personal name Stanisław (see Stanislav ).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When John Stanley was born in 1476, in Lichfield, Staffordshire, England, his father, George Stanley, was 41 and his mother, Eleanor Dudley alias Sutton, was 38. He married Cecily Freebody in 1500, in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 7 October 1534, in Hall Green, Worcestershire, England, at the age of 58, and was buried in Staffordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Stanley est né en 1476, à Lichfield, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, George Stanley, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Dudley alias Sutton, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Cecily Freebody en 1500, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 7 octobre 1534, à Hall Green, Worcestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Staffordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Stanley 1476 in Lichfield, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater George Stanley 41 und seine Mutter Eleanor Dudley alias Sutton 38. Er hat 1500 in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom Cecily Freebody geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 7. Oktober 1534 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Hall Green, Worcestershire, England und wurde in Staffordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Stanley è nato il nel 1476 nel Lichfield, Staffordshire, England, il suo padre, George Stanley, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Eleanor Dudley alias Sutton, aveva 38 anni. Lui sposato Cecily Freebody nel 1500, nel Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 7 ottobre 1534, nel Hall Green, Worcestershire, England, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolto a Staffordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Stanleyが1476年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアリチフィールドで生まれた時，父George Stanleyは41歳，母Eleanor Dudley alias Suttonは38歳であった。1500年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアでCecily Freebodyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1534年10月7日にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアハル グレンで58歳で死去し，イギリススタフォードシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Stanley(이)가 1476년 영국 스태퍼드실르 리ch필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 George Stanley(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor Dudley alias Sutton(은)는 38세였다. 그는 1500년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르에서 Cecily Freebody(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1534년 10월 7일 영국 워스스터실르 홀 그린에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스태퍼드실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Stanley nasceu em 1476, em Lichfield, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, George Stanley, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Dudley alias Sutton, tinha 38 anos. Ele casou-se com Cecily Freebody em 1500, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 7 de outubro de 1534, em Hall Green, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em Staffordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Stanley родился в 1476 г. в местности личфиелд, стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени George Stanley было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Dudley alias Sutton, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Cecily Freebody в 1500 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 7 октября 1534 г. в местности холл грин, ворсестиршир, Англия в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности стаффордшир, Англия.
